items.name: NI DAQ
items.description: National Instruments hardware for measuring electrical/physical phenomena and converting to digital data.

items.name: Oscilloscope
items.description: Instrument for observing varying signal voltages, crucial for debugging electronic circuits.

items.name: LED Matrix
items.description: 2D array of LEDs for displaying patterns, characters, or animations via individual control.

items.name: Arduino
items.description: Open-source platform for interactive objects, popular for prototyping and education.

items.name: Raspberry Pi
items.description: Small single-board computers for robotics, IoT, home automation, and education.

items.name: Basys 3 FPGA
items.description: Entry-level FPGA board with Artix-7, used for learning digital logic with Verilog/VHDL.

items.name: STM32 Nucleo
items.description: Affordable boards with STM32 MCUs (ARM Cortex-M) for prototyping and concept testing.

items.name: ESP32/8266
items.description: Low-cost Wi-Fi & Bluetooth/BLE MCUs for IoT, home automation, and wireless sensors.

items.name: Infineon PSoC 4
items.description: Programmable System-on-Chip with ARM Cortex-M0/M0+ and programmable analog/digital blocks.

items.name: Parallax Propeller
items.description: Multicore MCU with eight 32-bit cores for true parallel processing and deterministic timing.

items.name: Jetson Nano
items.description: Small, powerful computer for accelerated AI in embedded apps like image classification.

items.name: Comm Protocols
items.description: Rules for data transmission (I2C, SPI, UART, CAN, Ethernet, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth).

items.name: Altium Designer
items.description: EDA software for PCB, FPGA, and embedded software design in a unified environment.

items.name: Autodesk EAGLE
items.description: EDA tool for schematic capture, PCB layout, auto-router, and CAM features.

items.name: ORcad x Capture
items.description: Cadence EDA tools for designing ICs, SoCs, and PCBs.

items.name: Pspice/LTspice
items.description: SPICE-based analog circuit and digital logic simulation program for design verification.
